title: RFP uses the word punchout, but no cXML or OCI protocol is confirmed
impact: Scope cannot be priced safely until we know whether they need true procurement-system punchout or just a customer-specific portal.

title: Customer-specific pricing is missing or conflicting on multiple items
impact: A buyer-facing portal could show the wrong contract price.

title: Some items are not matched to NetSuite item ids
impact: These items cannot be safely automated into sales orders or inventory reports.

title: Lead time is unclear for special-order equipment
impact: Portal-lite can show products, but order submission should route to review until lead-time rules are confirmed.

title: Some products have no spec sheet URL
impact: RFP catalog may be incomplete or create manual follow-up work.
